scripts.dev:backend: pnpm dev:backend:infra:up && cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://api.localhost APP_MODE=backend-devmode MOCK_MODE=true turbo run dev --parallel --filter=@repo/web --filter=@repo/api
scripts.dev:backend:infra:up: cross-env COMPOSE_IGNORE_ORPHANS=true docker compose -f docker-compose.backend-dev.yaml up -d postgres caddy gotenberg
scripts.dev:backend:infra:down: cross-env COMPOSE_IGNORE_ORPHANS=true docker compose -f docker-compose.backend-dev.yaml stop postgres caddy gotenberg
scripts.dev:backend:infra:logs: cross-env COMPOSE_IGNORE_ORPHANS=true docker compose -f docker-compose.backend-dev.yaml logs -f postgres caddy gotenberg
scripts.dev:frontend:infra:up: cross-env COMPOSE_IGNORE_ORPHANS=true docker compose -f docker-compose.frontend-dev.yaml up -d --build
scripts.dev:frontend:infra:down: cross-env COMPOSE_IGNORE_ORPHANS=true docker compose -f docker-compose.frontend-dev.yaml stop
scripts.dev:frontend:infra:logs: cross-env COMPOSE_IGNORE_ORPHANS=true docker compose -f docker-compose.frontend-dev.yaml logs -f
